query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Global Markets: Australia shares log worst week in nearly a month with US-Iran talks stuck in limbo
articles.description: Australian shares experienced their worst week in nearly a month, with the S&P/ASX 200 index closing down 0.7% on Friday. Escalating U.S.-Iran tensions and conflicting Middle East headlines left investors uneasy, prompting profit-taking and a reassessment of risks from high oil prices and geopolitical instability. Financials and resources sectors saw significant declines.

articles.title: Maruti WagonR flex fuel: How does the technology actually work? Simply explained
articles.description: Flex fuel is expected to cut tailpipe emissions by up to 70 to 75 percent compared to regular petrol.

articles.title: World Environment Day: India Begins E85 Fuel Rollout, Cleaner Mobility Push Gains Momentum
articles.description: India starts phased rollout of E85 fuel across major cities, boosting ethanol blending in petrol and supporting cleaner mobility and reduced crude oil dependence.

articles.title: RBI Cuts FY27 Growth Forecast to 6.6% Amid West Asia Risks
articles.description: The RBI has lowered its FY27 GDP growth forecast to 6.6 percent from 6.9 percent, citing risks from the West Asia conflict, high crude oil prices and weather-related uncertainties. Despite the downgrade, the central bank said domestic demand remains resilient and kept the repo rate unchanged at 5.25 percent

articles.title: RBI MPC: India's Goldilocks moment dims, but the lights are not out
articles.description: India's economic "Goldilocks moment" is shifting as the RBI raises its inflation forecast and lowers growth projections due to external shocks like the West Asia conflict and elevated oil prices. Despite these headwinds, the central bank believes strong domestic fundamentals, including resilient consumption and investment, will help cushion the blow.

articles.title: Stagflation risks rise as oil prices threaten global growth outlook: Peter Cardillo
articles.description: Global economic outlook darkens with stagflation fears as energy prices fuel persistent inflation. Experts warn central banks may keep interest rates high longer than anticipated. Geopolitical tensions, particularly concerning Iran, are prolonging market uncertainty and could push oil prices back into triple digits, impacting global economic stability.

articles.title: Stagflation risks rise as oil prices threaten global growth outlook: Peter Cardillo
articles.description: Global economic outlook darkens with stagflation fears as energy prices fuel persistent inflation. Experts warn central banks may keep interest rates high longer than anticipated. Geopolitical tensions, particularly concerning Iran, are prolonging market uncertainty and could push oil prices back into triple digits, impacting global economic stability.

articles.title: RBI MPC Meeting 2026: Five key takeaways from Governor Malhotra's policy statement
articles.description: The RBI kept the repo rate unchanged at 5.25 per cent and retained its neutral stance, but Governor Sanjay Malhotra's policy statement carried key signals on slowing growth, rising inflation, elevated crude oil prices, monsoon risks and measures to attract foreign capital

articles.title: pronged dollar inflow package as rupee faces external pressures
articles.description: The move comes at a time when the rupee has been weighed down by rising crude oil prices, geopolitical tensions in West Asia, and persistent foreign portfolio flows. The Indian currency has depreciated sharply by over 6% this year.

articles.title: RBI worries higher energy costs could fuel inflation, slow growth
articles.description: RBI MPC Meeting 2026 Crude Oil Price Impact on Inflation: India's headline inflation may rise by 36 basis points due to higher petrol and diesel prices. The Reserve Bank of India warns that elevated energy costs and supply disruptions will impact economic activity. Global factors are also contributing to broader inflationary pressures. The central bank has maintained its key repo rate and policy stance.
